CREATE TABLE names (id UInt32, name String);
SELECT soundex(name) FROM names WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM names WHERE name LIKE 'R%');
SELECT soundex(name) AS soundex_code, COUNT(*) FROM names GROUP BY soundex_code;
SELECT n1.name AS name1, n2.name AS name2 FROM names n1 JOIN names n2 ON soundex(n1.name) = soundex(n2.name) WHERE n1.id <> n2.id;
WITH (SELECT soundex(name) FROM names WHERE id = 1) AS soundex_value SELECT soundex_value;
SELECT soundex(name) FROM (SELECT name FROM names WHERE id > 2) AS filtered_names;
CREATE TABLE more_names AS SELECT id, name FROM names WHERE id < 5;
SELECT soundex(name) FROM more_names ORDER BY soundex(name);
